ProjectMeta.Description: Telegram Mini App for AI-assisted calorie tracking with a FastAPI backend, React frontend, PostgreSQL persistence, and a Telegram bot launcher.
ProjectMeta.ArchitecturePattern: Layered monolith with extracted domain subpackages and a single-file frontend shell

Module.annotation: Primary FastAPI module defining DTOs, app lifecycle, auth, meals, dashboard, scans, profile history, and health endpoints.

Class.NAME: AuthResponse
Class.annotation: Authentication payload returned after Telegram verification.

Class.NAME: ProfileOut
Class.annotation: Profile response model enriched with progression fields.

Class.NAME: MealOut
Class.annotation: Meal response model with flattened meal items.

Class.NAME: ScanStatusResponse
Class.annotation: Scan job status model with optional AI result payload.

Module.annotation: Database adapter wrapping psycopg connections, query execution, and transaction control.

Class.NAME: DBConnection
Class.annotation: Thin wrapper normalizing query placeholder style and exposing commit lifecycle methods.

Method.NAME: execute
Method.annotation: Executes a SQL statement after converting placeholders to psycopg format.

Module.annotation: OpenRouter integration module for nutrition estimation and recalculation requests.

Class.NAME: AISettings
Class.annotation: Configuration dataclass for the OpenRouter client.

Class.NAME: OpenRouterClient
Class.annotation: Client that formats prompts, calls OpenRouter, and normalizes nutrition output.

Method.NAME: analyze_food
Method.SIGNATURE: (image_data_url: str, description: str | None = None) -> dict[str, Any]
Method.annotation: Analyzes a meal photo and returns normalized nutrition data.

Method.NAME: analyze_text
Method.annotation: Estimates nutrition from a text-only meal description.

Method.NAME: recalculate
Method.SIGNATURE: (base_result: dict[str, Any], comment: str) -> dict[str, Any]
Method.annotation: Re-estimates nutrition using a prior result and user correction.

Module.annotation: Environment-backed settings loader for backend runtime configuration.

Class.NAME: Settings
Class.annotation: Immutable runtime settings for API, AI provider, database, and retention policy.

Module.annotation: In-memory metrics registry that renders counters and summaries in Prometheus text format.

Class.NAME: MetricsStore
Class.annotation: Thread-safe metrics accumulator for request, scan, and recalculate telemetry.

Method.NAME: inc
Method.SIGNATURE: (name: str, labels: dict[str, str], value: float = 1.0)

Method.NAME: observe
Method.SIGNATURE: (name: str, labels: dict[str, str], value: float)
Method.annotation: Records a labeled observation into summary buckets.

Module.annotation: Simple in-memory sliding-window rate limiter used for auth and scan endpoints.

Class.NAME: InMemoryRateLimiter
Class.annotation: Stores timestamp queues per key and enforces per-minute request limits.

Module.annotation: Telegram Mini App initData validator implementing hash and TTL checks.

Class.NAME: TelegramAuthError
Class.annotation: Raised when Telegram initData is invalid or expired.

Module.annotation: Telegram bot worker that publishes the WebApp button and reacts to start commands.
Static achievement definitions and keyword groups used by the achievements engine.
Achievement and streak response schemas shared with the API layer.

Class.NAME: StreakOut
Class.annotation: Represents the current and longest meal logging streak.

Class.NAME: AchievementOut
Class.annotation: Represents a single achievement track and its unlock status.

Class.NAME: AchievementsResponse
Class.annotation: Wraps streak state and the list of achievement progress entries.

Module.annotation: Achievement engine that computes derived metrics from meal history and unlocks catalog entries.
Package export surface for achievements schemas and evaluation service functions.
Progression response schema describing current level and XP thresholds.

Class.NAME: LevelProgressOut
Class.annotation: Represents current level, XP, and XP required for the next level.

Module.annotation: Progression engine that awards XP for meals, completed days, streaks, and calorie target hits.

Class.NAME: ProgressionAwardResult
Class.annotation: Encapsulates updated progression state and whether a level-up occurred.

Module.annotation: Package export surface for progression schemas and XP service helpers.
Backend package marker for the application module tree.
Frontend bootstrap module mounting the app and localization provider into the DOM.
Single-file React application shell containing dashboard, daily log, profile/settings, add meal, and scan workflows.
Typed fetch client for frontend communication with the FastAPI backend including the expanded profile contract and Telegram auth bootstrap.
Localization provider loading JSON dictionaries and exposing translation helpers through React context.

Scenario.NAME: Manual meal logging and meal history management
AI scan, recalculate, and confirm meal flow
Telegram bot launches the mini app
